<!--
Before filing: please confirm you have read GOAL.md, AGENTS.md, and the
relevant milestone section of ORISON_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_HANDOFF.md. Feature
requests that conflict with the stated milestone order or with documented
product invariants will be closed.
-->

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the user (human or
agent), the task, and what is currently impossible or painful. Avoid
proposing a solution in this section. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the proposed capability at the contract level: what new CLI
flag, JSON schema, agent API, language construct, or doc would exist? Be
specific. -->

## Agent-visible contract impact

<!-- This is the section that distinguishes Orison from a normal language
proposal. Anything the compiler knows must be available to agents through
stable structured output. -->

- New or changed schemas (`schemas/`):
- New or changed CLI subcommands or flags:
- New or changed agent ABI surfaces (maps, capsules, symbol cards, patches):
- Stability impact (additive, new version, breaking — and migration plan):

## Alternatives considered

<!-- At least one alternative is required. "Do nothing" is a valid
alternative if the cost is high. -->

-

<!-- Which milestone in ORISON_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_HANDOFF.md does this belong
to (M0..M21)? If it does not fit any current milestone, explain why a new
milestone is justified. -->

- Target milestone:
- Rationale:
